# OKPlumb — Tulsa's Trusted Plumber

> Family-owned plumbing for the Tulsa metro. Honest work, flat-rate diagnostics, 24/7 emergency service.

## About
OKPlumb is a licensed, insured plumbing company serving the greater Tulsa, Oklahoma metro.
Phone: (918) 851-8203. Hours: Mon-Fri 7a-6p, emergency 24/7.

## Services
- Drain Cleaning & Hydro-Jetting
- Water Heater Repair & Installation (tank and tankless)
- Whole-Home Repiping (PEX and copper)
- Leak Detection & Slab Leaks
- Sewer Line Repair & Replacement (trenchless and traditional)
- Fixture Installation & Repair

## Service areas
Tulsa, Broken Arrow, Jenks, Owasso, Bixby, Sand Springs, Sapulpa, Claremore, Catoosa, Coweta, Glenpool, Collinsville.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.ok-plumbing.com/
- Services: https://www.ok-plumbing.com/services
- Service areas: https://www.ok-plumbing.com/service-areas
- Emergency: https://www.ok-plumbing.com/emergency
